mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_search_event (ticket_id, event_type, event_status, retry_count, next_retry_at, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{eventType}, #{eventStatus}, #{retryCount}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT event_id, ticket_id, event_type, event_status, retry_count, next_retry_at, claimed_at, processed_at, error_message, create_time, update_time FROM ticket_search_event WHERE event_status = #{eventStatus} AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= NOW()) ORDER BY event_id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_search_event SET event_status = #{targetStatus}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, claimed_at = NULL, error_message = #{errorMessage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND event_status = #{expectedStatus}
UPDATE ticket_search_event SET event_status = 'PENDING', retry_count = 0, next_retry_at = NOW(), claimed_at = NULL, error_message = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE event_status = 'FAILED'

UPDATE ticket_search_event SET event_status = 'PENDING', retry_count = 0, next_retry_at = NOW(), claimed_at = NULL, processed_at = NULL, error_message = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE event_id > #{eventId}
